extract: Remoraid (Japanese: テッポウオ Teppouo) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves into Octillery starting at level 25. If a Remoraid is in the party when a Mantyke levels up, the Mantyke evolves into Mantine. However, this will not affect the Remoraid and it continues to be a separate Pokémon.
